title: Rule-Connect-GenerativeAI
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega GenerativeAI connector rule (Rule-Connect-GenerativeAI). Defines model configuration, prompt references, response mappings, and parameters. Built from 27 real Pega 26 rules spanning v1 (08-24) and v2 (08-25+) structural eras. Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields (pxCreateDateTime, pxUpdateOperator, pzInsKey, etc.) are omitted.

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label for the connector.

pyClassName.description: The Pega class this connector is defined on (e.g., '@baseclass', 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase', 'Work-').

pyServiceName.description: Service endpoint name — must match pyRuleName.

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name (PascalCase or camelCase). Auto-filled from pyServiceName.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset the connector is saved to.

pyDescription.description: Optional free-text description of the connector's purpose.

pyExpectedResponseEntity.description: How the AI response is parsed. 'Custom' for text/JSON output, 'Single' for single-entity extraction, 'List' for list output with pyListName.

pyListName.description: Required when pyExpectedResponseEntity='List'; omit or leave empty for 'Custom' and 'Single'. Dot-prefixed property path for the list (e.g., '.pyCucumberScenarios', '.pyStages').

pyCustomizeSystemPrompt.description: Whether a custom system prompt overrides the default. Always set to 'false' to use the default system prompt.

pyImprovePrivacy.description: Whether privacy improvement processing is applied. 'true' to enable PII redaction and related features.

pyDisplayMode.description: 'clone' for rules derived from template (most common), 'basic' for hand-authored, 'specialize' for specialized overrides.

pyMethodStatus.description: Optional status marker. 'Internal' for platform-internal connectors, 'Deprecated' for retired ones.

pyPromptName.description: User-prompt FieldValue name. Always use the default value 'pyGenerativeAIPromptTemplate'. Do NOT generate custom prompt names.

pySystemPromptName.description: System-prompt FieldValue name. Always use the default value 'pzDefaultSystemPrompt'. Do NOT generate custom system prompt names.

pyUseCase.description: Top-level use-case field. 'qa' for Q&A tasks, 'custom' for structured/JSON output. On v2 rules the server also maintains an authoritative copy inside the server-managed pyGenAIDef page; only the top-level field is authored in create payloads.

pyUseOpLocaleForResponse.description: v1 locale flag. Whether AI response should use the operator's locale. Equivalent to pyGenAILocale on v2 rules.

pyDeleteMemo.description: Memo captured when a version of this rule was deleted.

pyGenAIProvConfig.description: Provider configuration (Data-GenerativeAI-Provider-*) — the only provider/config block authored in create payloads. On v2 rules the server additionally materializes server-managed pyGenAIDef and pyGenAIConfig pages from this input; do NOT author those v2 pages.

pyResponseFields.description: Response field mappings — where the AI output is written on the clipboard. At least one entry required.

pyCustomFields.description: Named page group for custom field metadata (e.g., pyUsageMode). Present when pyIsCustomFieldExists='true'.

GenAIProvConfig.description: Provider configuration (Data-GenerativeAI-Provider-*). The only provider/config block authored on a create payload. Contains direct provider endpoint details; on v2 rules the server materializes server-managed pyGenAIDef and pyGenAIConfig pages from this input.

pyTemperature.description: Temperature value as string (e.g., '0.2', '1.0'). Model temperature override at the connector level.

ResponseField.description: A response field mapping (Embed-Fields) — maps AI output to a clipboard property.

pyFieldName.description: Dot-prefixed clipboard property path where the AI output is written (e.g., '.pyResponseData', '.pyJsonData', '.pyMessage').

CustomField.description: A custom field entry (Embed-CustomFieldsList) — metadata tag on the connector.

pxSubscript.description: Key name of the custom field (e.g., 'pyUsageMode').

pyCFieldValue.description: Field value. For pyUsageMode: 'Runtime' for connectors called at runtime, 'Design time' for design-assistant connectors.

pyNote.description: Additional note on the custom field (e.g., 'Text'). Mirrors pyCFieldType on observed rules.
